This is a testharness.js-based test.
Found 123 FAIL, 0 TIMEOUT, 0 NOTRUN.
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 100%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(1)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 100%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 100%)' as a computed value should serialize as '1'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 100%)' and '1' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "1" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(2)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 5 50%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(3.5)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 5 50%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 5 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '3.5'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 5 50%)' and '3.5' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "3.5" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 7 0%, 5 50%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(3.5)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 7 0%, 5 50%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 7 0%, 5 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '3.5'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 25%, 3 25%, 7 0%, 5 50%)' and '3.5' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "3.5" but got "none"

  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(10px 75%, 3em 75%)' should be valid in text-indent. got disallowed value ""

  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 50%, 3 50%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 50%, 3 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 50%, 3 50%)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"

  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 50%, 3 50%, 5, 7)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 50%, 3 50%, 5, 7)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.

[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 0%, 3 100%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(3)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 0%, 3 100%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 0%, 3 100%)' as a computed value should serialize as '3'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 * sibling-index() 0%, 3 100%)' and '3' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "3" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%, 5, 7)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%, 5, 7)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%, 5, 7)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%, 5, 7)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(50% * sibling-index()), 3 50%, 5, 7)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(150%), 3 100%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(1 calc(150%), 3 100%)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(150%), 3 100%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(150%), 3 100%)' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(150%), 3 100%)' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(-50%), 3 100%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(1 calc(-50%), 3 100%)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(-50%), 3 100%)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(1 calc(-50%), 3 100%)' as a computed value should serialize as '3'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(1 calc(-50%), 3 100%)' and '3' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "3" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%))' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(20% + 10px)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%))' should be valid in text-indent. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%))' as a computed value should serialize as 'calc(20% + 10px)'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%))' and 'calc(20% + 10px)' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "calc(20% + 10px)" but got "0px"
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))' should be valid in text-indent. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))' as a computed value should serialize as 'calc(20% + 10px)'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))' and 'calc(20% + 10px)' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "calc(20% + 10px)" but got "0px"
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%)) ' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(20% + 10px)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%)) ' should be valid in width. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%)) ' as a computed value should serialize as '30px'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% 50%, 30% 50%)) ' and '30px' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "30px" but got "100px"
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%)) ' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%))'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%)) ' should be valid in width. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%)) ' as a computed value should serialize as '30px'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(10px + calc-mix(10% * sibling-index() 50%, 30% 50%)) ' and '30px' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "30px" but got "100px"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)' should be valid in text-indent. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)' as a computed value should serialize as '65px'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)' and '65px' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "65px" but got "0px"
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50% )' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50%)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50% )' should be valid in width. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50% )' as a computed value should serialize as '65px'.
  assert_equals: 'calc-mix(10em 50%, 30px 50% )' and '65px' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "65px" but got "100px"
[FAIL] 'calc(sign(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)) + 10)' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(11)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(sign(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)) + 10)' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(sign(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)) + 10)' as a computed value should serialize as '11'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(sign(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%)) + 10)' and '11' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "11" but got "none"
[FAIL] 'calc(max(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%), 1))' as a specified value should serialize as 'calc(2)'.
  assert_not_equals: 'calc(max(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%), 1))' should be valid in scale. got disallowed value ""
[FAIL] 'calc(max(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%), 1))' as a computed value should serialize as '2'.
  assert_equals: 'calc(max(calc-mix(1 50%, 3 50%), 1))' and '2' should serialize the same in computed values. expected "2" but got "none"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
